mapper.sql: e.er_id, e.oprtr_id, o.oprtr_nm, e.rprt_yr, e.er_ver, e.er_st_cd, e.rprt_prd_end_dt, e.isue_dt, e.emp_plan_id_apld, e.emp_ver_apld, e.emp_aprv_dt, e.emp_eff_dt, e.emp_updt_dt, e.cert_use_yn, e.allc_use_yn, e.sbmt_dt, e.aprv_dt, e.aprv_user_id, e.rjct_dt, e.rjct_rsn, e.use_bgng_dt, e.use_end_dt, e.frst_reg_dt, e.frst_reg_user_id, e.last_chg_dt, e.last_chg_user_id
FROM er.tn_er e JOIN com.tn_oprtr o ON o.oprtr_id = e.oprtr_id AND NOW() BETWEEN o.use_bgng_dt AND o.use_end_dt WHERE NOW() BETWEEN e.use_bgng_dt AND e.use_end_dt

sql.if: AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM com.tn_vrfcn_assgn va WHERE va.vrfcn_inst_id = #{vrfcnInstId} AND va.oprtr_id = e.oprtr_id AND va.rprt_yr = e.rprt_yr AND NOW() BETWEEN va.use_bgng_dt AND va.use_end_dt )

mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE( MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(er_id, LENGTH(#{prefix}) + 1) AS INTEGER)), 0 ) FROM er.tn_er WHERE er_id LIKE #{prefix} || '%' AND SUBSTRING(er_id, LENGTH(#{prefix}) + 1) ~ '^[0-9]+$'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO er.tn_er (er_id, oprtr_id, rprt_yr, er_ver, er_st_cd, rprt_prd_end_dt, isue_dt, emp_plan_id_apld, emp_ver_apld, emp_aprv_dt, emp_eff_dt, emp_updt_dt, cert_use_yn, allc_use_yn, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id) VALUES (#{erId}, #{oprtrId}, #{rprtYr}, #{erVer}, 'DRAFT', #{rprtPrdEndDt}, #{isueDt}, #{empPlanIdApld}, #{empVerApld}, #{empAprvDt}, #{empEffDt}, #{empUpdtDt}, COALESCE(#{certUseYn}, 'N'), COALESCE(#{allcUseYn}, 'N'), NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{frstRegUserId}, NOW(), #{lastChgUserId})
mapper.update: UPDATE er.tn_er SET rprt_prd_end_dt = #{rprtPrdEndDt}, isue_dt = #{isueDt}, emp_plan_id_apld = #{empPlanIdApld}, emp_ver_apld = #{empVerApld}, emp_aprv_dt = #{empAprvDt}, emp_eff_dt = #{empEffDt}, emp_updt_dt = #{empUpdtDt}, cert_use_yn = #{certUseYn}, allc_use_yn = #{allcUseYn}, last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{lastChgUserId} WHERE er_id = #{erId} AND er_st_cd = 'DRAFT' AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt

UPDATE er.tn_er SET use_end_dt = NOW() - INTERVAL '1 minute', last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{userId} WHERE er_id = #{erId} AND er_st_cd = 'DRAFT' AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
UPDATE er.tn_er SET er_st_cd = 'SBMTD', sbmt_dt = NOW(), last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{userId} WHERE er_id = #{erId} AND er_st_cd = 'DRAFT' AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt

UPDATE er.tn_er SET er_st_cd = 'DRAFT', rjct_dt = NOW(), rjct_rsn = #{reason}, last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{userId} WHERE er_id = #{erId} AND er_st_cd = 'RVWNG' AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt

UPDATE er.tn_er SET er_st_cd = 'APRVD', aprv_dt = NOW(), aprv_user_id = #{userId}, last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{userId} WHERE er_id = #{erId} AND er_st_cd IN ('RVWNG', 'RCMDD') AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt

UPDATE er.tn_er SET er_st_cd = 'CNCLD', rjct_rsn = #{reason}, last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{userId} WHERE er_id = #{erId} AND er_st_cd = 'APRVD' AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
